titles.title: Cast Your Bread Upon the Water

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well I picked up the good Book, Took me a long look, And I believed in each and every part; But I sure rejoiced in knowing About the reaping and the sowing, I really took that lesson to my heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I cast my bread upon the water By helping a brother, Struggling on life's stormy sea; Don't you know I'm sowing a good seed, By doing a good deed, It's gonna come back, come back to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well, I can't buy my way to heaven, There's a heaven waiting, Purchased by our good and loving Lord; So I'll go on striving, trusting and surviving, Holding on expecting my reward.
